title: Call with Ethan Hemstead — m4a-audio orphan attachment
html:
TL;DR

  • Nov 27, 2025 (Thanksgiving Day) Apple Note containing only an m4a call-recording attachment with Ethan Hemstead — no transcript, no notes body.
  • Pure audio-orphan sub-pattern, same form as 2025 09 29 call recording, 2026 01 24 call with bapi, 2026 04 16 call with emily stevens.
  • Captured during the Rankett-prospecting era — six weeks before the Jan 7 GTM bible and nearly contemporaneous with the Dec 21 ranker org questions. Likely an early agency-prospect or advisor call.
  • Ethan Hemstead first-mention in vault → queue to Potential Entities; promote on 2nd surface or if rankett-thread context confirms agency role.
  • Thanksgiving-Day timing is itself notable — Yahir taking sales/network calls on a major US family-holiday is consistent with the founder arc grind register.

Why it matters

Locates Yahir in late-2025 cold-outreach mode for what would crystallize as rankett. The call-recording-as-note habit suggests Yahir was treating these as deal-flow artifacts to revisit — the fact that no transcript or notes were ever written means the recording itself was the deliverable. Pair with 2025 09 29 call recording (also just a recording) and the January Bapi call to see the outreach-cadence rhythm through the Rankett-launch quarter.

Privacy considerations

  • Audio file ($8899B612-…m4a-audio UUID-named attachment) is on-device only — not surfaced, not transcribed.
  • Ethan Hemstead's name surfaces as a note title (publicly chosen by Yahir), so it's recorded; no contact info, phone, or email surfaced from raw note.
  • Recording a call requires consent in some US states (two party consent states include Oregon historically); worth flagging for security hygiene yahir synthesis if pattern grows.

Open questions

  • Who is Ethan Hemstead? Agency owner? SEO peer? Advisor?
  • Did this call influence the GTM bible or the 60 day activation rule filter?
  • Was the call answered, or was this a voicemail capture?
